title: Space Girls in Beverly Hills
overview: Three vibrantly retro space girls from the planet Vanisia must try to fit in as normal Beverly Hills women when they suddenly make a crash landing in the backyard of wealthy infamous playboy Baron Von Benson. Baron and his woman-chasing buddy Steve soon realize that it takes something out of this galaxy to tame their cheap bad boy ways.
